_comment: Example config/workspace-setup.json. Copy to config/workspace-setup.json (LOCAL, gitignored) and edit for THIS fleet's projects. Keys are project names as they appear under projects/. A project with no entry is left exactly as-is (no setup runs). Schema and semantics: docs/workspace-setup.md. Keys starting with _ are ignored.

steps.name: secrets
steps._comment: shelf has NO `secrets` script in package.json. Its Next.js env is pulled with `pnpm pull-env` (npx vercel env pull, needs Vercel auth). The warehouse/dbt .envrc is handled separately by shelf's own treehouse.toml post_create hook. Confirm the right command for this fleet before relying on it.

steps.name: secrets
steps._comment: package.json `secrets` script = `bun run scripts/pull-secrets.ts`. Doppler-backed; `bun run secrets` alone errors without Doppler, so pass --fallback for headless worktrees without doppler auth.

steps.name: ios
steps._comment: Opt-in: iOS tuist install/generate makes no sense for a headless agent worktree and needs Xcode. Flip enabled to true only on a machine set up for iOS builds.
steps.run: cd apps/ios/ShelfInsights && tuist install && tuist generate
